family.capability_summary: Hub search, papers, docs, and generative HF tools via MCP bridge.
Issue tracking, assignments, and project ops via Linear MCP.
Observability investigations and agent runs via Firetiger MCP.
Metrics, logs, and monitors via Datadog MCP (pending healthy server).
SDK, rules, skills, PR split, and statusline authoring.
Automations, loops, babysit CI, and shell execution guidance.
Live React canvas artifacts for analytical deliverables.
Cursor settings, CLI config, and skill migration.
Subagent creation and dispatch patterns.
Hub CLI download/upload operations.
Dataset repo creation and row streaming.
Dataset Viewer API pagination and filters.
Eval tables and model card scores.
Cloud GPU jobs and UV scripts.
TRL SFT/DPO/GRPO training on HF Jobs.
Research paper pages on the Hub.
Reusable HF API tool scripts.
Training metrics and alerts.
Gradio demo UIs.
Spatial reasoning, mystic, v9/v10, recipe, imagine lanes.
Forge build, patch, document vision, UI vision.
Audio, video, image, beatbox, speakers, story forge.
Action, memory, narrative trust, forensic triangulation.
Ledger, replay, and operator decision surfaces.
Workspace projects, game front door, world pack.
